attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
EL.OBJECT_ID,
EL.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID, 
COALESCE(EL.LINE_NUMBER,-8888) as LINE_NUMBER, 
EL.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,
EL.LINE_TYPE,
EL.LINE_TYPE_NAME, 
EL.EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL,
EL.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
EL.QUANTITY,
EL.FINAL_NET_PRICE,
EL.PART_NUMBER,
EL.DESCRIPTION, 
EL.FULFILLMENT_TYPE, 
EL.DURATION,
EL.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
EL.MLB_INDICATOR,
EL.PROMO_DISC,
EL.NONSTANDARD_DISC,
EL.TRADE_IN_DISC, 
EL.MULTI_YEAR_DISC, 
EL.ACTIVE, 
COALESCE(EL.CREATED_DATE, CURRENT_DATE) as CREATED_DATE,
COALESCE(EL.CREATED_BY,'CCW') as  CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(EL.UPDATED_DATE, CURRENT_DATE) as UPDATED_DATE,
COALESCE(EL.UPDATED_BY,'CCW') as  UPDATED_BY,
EL.WEB_ORDER_ID, 
EL.ORDER_STATUS,
EL.WF_PRICED, 
EL.SMT_LINE_ID_INT,
EL.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
EL.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,
EL.NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC,
EL.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,
EL.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
COALESCE(EL.OEM_REB_FLAG,'NYCD') as  OEM_REB_FLAG,
EL.PROGRAM_ID,
EL.AS_PROJECT_NUMBER, 
EL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
EL.SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
EL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
EL.GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
EL.TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
EL.UI_HIDE_FLG,
EL.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
EL.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
EL.CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
EL.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
EL.REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
EL.ACTION_TAG_NM,
EL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
EL.BILLING_MODEL_NM,
EL.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
EL.RATE_TABLE_NM,
EL.RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
EL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
EL.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
EL.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
EL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
EL.USAGE_QTY,
EL.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
EL.REQUESTED_START_DATE,
EL.REQUESTED_END_DATE,
EL.MAGIC_KEY,
EL.MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,
COALESCE(AI_INTENT,'UNKNOWN') AS AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(PRODUCT_STRATEGY_CLASS,'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
COALESCE(STRATEGIC_FACTOR,1.000000) AS AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
COALESCE(PRODUCT_STRATEGY_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
 
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LN_VW_KFKA EL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EL.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,EL.OBJECT_ID  ORDER BY EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC,EL.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER DESC)=1 --Added Create_dtm as part of CCW data fix Aug rel
Where EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW_KAFKA')
